lastReviewSummary: Reviewed ~20 substantive sessions from Jun 1 - Jul 15. Major themes: (1) Homa became a full product with 3-layer architecture (curriculum-studio → lesson-planner → materials-studio), feedback loop (Aless + Carolyng), and inspo flywheel (180+ reference JSONs). (2) consulting-os expanded: Seeker from 1→3 departments, Creative Campaign Tracker built, Corey Ganim playbook ingested, AI Readiness Assessment lead magnet built. (3) Operational lessons codified: deploy-first-reply-second for #homa-feedback, always-use-skill for #homa-inspo, mobile CSS always-check, #chat auto-respond OFF. (4) Content engine got SQLite fallback (Jul 13) after Supabase 401. (5) frontend-feedback skill created from Sid's CSS viewport directive. Updated MEMORY.md with Homa, consulting-os, and operational lessons sections.
